notableEvents.label: Moisés Ballesteros grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Moisés Ballesteros hits a grand slam (5) to right field. Alex Bregman scores. Ian Happ scores. Seiya Suzuki scores.

notableEvents.label: Matt Shaw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Shaw grounds out, shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Ty France.

notableEvents.label: Matt Shaw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Shaw singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Ty France.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Mason Miller. Dansby Swanson scores. Nico Hoerner to 2nd.
